landingPage.brands.feat1_desc: Your AI ambassador looks identical on TikTok, Instagram and YouTube. Face Consistency™ across all platforms.
landingPage.brands.feat2_desc: Enter URL or product photo → AI creates Script, voice and video. A/B variants automatically.
landingPage.brands.feat3_desc: TikTok, Instagram, YouTube, LinkedIn — all formats in one step including AI hashtags.
landingPage.brands.intro: No more expensive shoots. InfluexAI gives your brand a distinctive AI spokesperson that looks the same everywhere.
landingPage.cta.sub1: For creators who want to go viral.
landingPage.cta.sub2: For brands that want to scale.
landingPage.faq.a1: Credits are the currency in InfluexAI. Each module costs 2–5 Credits per generation. Credits never expire.
landingPage.faq.a3: Yes. Servers in the EU, no sharing of your data with third parties without consent.
landingPage.faq.a4: Yes — in the Voice & Music module. 30+ seconds of audio is enough for high-quality cloning.
landingPage.faq.a5: TikTok, Instagram Reels, YouTube Shorts & Long-Form, LinkedIn — all common formats.
landingPage.features.f1_desc: Virale Short-Scripts in Sekunden — Hook, Story, CTA und Hashtags für TikTok & YouTube.
landingPage.features.f2_desc: Dein KI-Avatar in jeder Szene. Konsistentes Gesicht über alle generierten Bilder und Videos.
landingPage.features.f3_desc: Face Swap für Clips und Live — dein Gesicht, jede Szene, ohne teure Shootings.
landingPage.features.f6_desc: Viral Score für Scripts und Ideen — datenbasierte Empfehlungen vor dem Upload.
landingPage.features.sidebar: Kein Tool-Chaos. Alles für KI-Content in einer Plattform.
landingPage.how.s2_desc: Live Creator, My AI Self, Product Advertising or Voice & Music — all in one studio.
landingPage.how.s3_desc: Upload, enter URL or text. AI delivers in seconds — export-ready for all platforms.
landingPage.pricing.headline: Transparent. Scalable.
landingPage.testimonials.t1_quote: Product ads in under 3 minutes. Our ROAS increased by 40%.
landingPage.testimonials.t2_quote: Finally a tool where my AI face looks the same everywhere.
